payload.reason: Producer yielded complete without creating test files
payload.context: The tdd-red-producer for TASK-3 yielded type=complete and claims to have created internal/interview/gap.go and internal/interview/gap_test.go with 19 tests. However, these files do not exist on the filesystem. The /Users/joe/.claude/skills/arch-interview-producer/internal/ directory was never created.
evidence: find command searching for *.go files in ISSUE-61 project directory returns no results
The producer documented 19 tests with detailed coverage mapping but never wrote the actual test code
payload.impact: Cannot proceed with QA review. The fundamental contract of TDD red phase is violated - tests must exist before they can be reviewed.
payload.question: How should I handle this? Options:
options: Re-run tdd-red-producer for TASK-3 and ensure files are actually written
Investigate why producer yielded complete without writing files
Check if there's a different location where files should have been written
